task_completion.description: Verify that the title 'Manaus Rainfall' is present on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Manaus Rainfall' clearly visible at the top or near the graph on the ActivInspire canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify that X and Y axes are drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two perpendicular lines (horizontal for X, vertical for Y) forming the foundation of the bar graph.

task_completion.description: Verify that there are exactly four vertical bars and they are blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for four distinct vertical rectangular shapes originating from the X-axis. Check that the fill color of these bars is blue.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bars are labeled 'Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', and 'Apr'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text labels 'Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', and 'Apr' positioned along the X-axis, corresponding to each of the four vertical bars.

task_completion.description: Verify that the heights of the bars accurately reflect the data trend (Mar > Apr > Jan > Feb).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Compare the relative heights of the four bars. The 3rd bar (Mar) must be the tallest, the 4th bar (Apr) must be the second tallest, the 1st bar (Jan) must be the third tallest, and the 2nd bar (Feb) must be the shortest.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file is saved to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'rainfall_graph.flipchart', or check the ActivInspire window title bar for 'rainfall_graph.flipchart' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the graph.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking on ActivInspire tools (like shapes, text, lines) and interacting with the canvas, rather than using a terminal to run a script that generates the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the graph was built step-by-step rather than pasted as a single pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps in the screenshots, such as drawing individual lines, typing text, or drawing individual bars, rather than a complete graph suddenly appearing on a blank canvas.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is actually using ActivInspire.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire interface, including its specific toolbars, menus, and window borders, ensuring the agent didn't use a different drawing tool or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected file path: /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/rainfall_graph.flipchart. Target bar color: blue. Data points: Jan (260), Feb (240), Mar (310), Apr (280). Required relative height trend for bars: Mar is tallest, followed by Apr, then Jan, and Feb is the shortest.
